name: Breanna Storage Ottoman: Cow Print, Rectangular Bench - Christopher Knight Home
description: Enjoy this Christopher Knight Home Breanna Storage Ottoman in your home today. Perfect for either a living room, office setting or even a bedroom. This ottoman boasts a decent amount of storage, ideal for those extra board games you have lying around, or those DVDs that you want easy access too, but do not necessarily want to display. This Christopher Knight Home Breanna Storage Ottoman is a great way to provide a place to put your feet up after a long day or provide extra seating for any room of your house.
